subject: Re: WarpTools and AMD GPUs
body:
Hi Juha,

There are many CUDA kernels
<https://github.com/warpem/warp/tree/main/NativeAcceleration/gtom/src>,
PyTorch is only used for deep learning in Warp.

Cheers,

Alister

On Thu, 5 Dec 2024 at 12:38, Juha Huiskonen <juha.huiskonen@gmail.com>
wrote:

> Hi Alister,
>
> Would this work if I install PyTorch with ROCm support for AMD GPUs?
> Or is there something in the code that is tied directly to CUDA?
>
> Cheers,
> Juha
>
> On Thu, Dec 5, 2024 at 4:38 PM Alister Burt <alisterburt@gmail.com> wrote:
> >
> > Hi Juha,
> >
> > It’s not impossible in principle but the work required to make it happen
> hasn’t been done and isn’t planned.
> >
> > Cheers,
> >
> > Alister
> >
> > Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
> >
> > On Dec 4, 2024, at 22:31, Juha Huiskonen <juha.huiskonen@gmail.com>
> wrote:
> >
> > ﻿Dear all,
> >
> > Is it possible to run WarpTools and MCore using AMD GPUs.  Specifically
> AMD MI250x?
> >
> > Cheers,
> > Juha
> >
